framework.name: Pull-to-Push Commerce Transition
framework.description: The fundamental transaction model is shifting from human-initiated (pull) to agent-initiated (push) commerce. Instead of 'I want X, I'll buy it,' the model becomes 'System detected need, transaction executed, human notified.' This inverts the traditional e-commerce funnel.
framework.raw_quote: The transaction isn't the end of a choice. It's the result of an algorithm that decided you've already decided... did I buy this or was I just optimized?
